## Description
Describe the changes made and the rationale behind them.

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🛡️ Security hardening
- [ ] 🧬 DNA Evolution change
- [ ] 🏛️ Architectural refactor (Clean Room alignment)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the **Clean Room Engineering** rules (no legacy copy-paste).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have added **Zod validation** for any new data structures.
- [ ] My changes generate no new TypeScript warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable).
- [ ] I have verified that the **Quantum Mirror** simulation still passes.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.
